411 }

498 // Token: 0x06002BDA RID: 11226 RVA: 0x00592A38 File Offset: 0x00590C38
499 private void PreparePreview_Main()
500 {
501 this._player.direction = 1;
502 this.TryAutoAssigningHair();
503 this.UpdatePreviewItems();
504 }
505
506 // Token: 0x06002BDB RID: 11227 RVA: 0x00592A52 File Offset: 0x00590C52
507 private void PreparePreview_ClothStyle()
508 {
509 this._player.direction = (this._player.Male ? 1 : (-1));
510 this.TryAutoAssigningHair();
511 this.UpdatePreviewItems();
512 }
513
514 // Token: 0x06002BDC RID: 11228 RVA: 0x00592A7C File Offset: 0x00590C7C
515 private void TryAutoAssigningHair()
516 {
517 if (this._lastSelectedHairstyle != null)
518 {
519 return;
520 }
521 int num;
522 if (this._defaultHairstylesForClothStyle.TryGetValue(this._player.skinVariant, out num))
523 {
524 this._player.hair = num;
525 }
526 }
527
528 // Token: 0x06002BDD RID: 11229 RVA: 0x00592AC0 File Offset: 0x00590CC0
529 private void UpdatePreviewItems()
530 {
531 UICharacterCreation.ArmorAssignments armorAssignments = this._femaleArmor;
532 if (this._player.Male)
533 {
534 armorAssignments = this._maleArmor;
535 }
536 this._player.armor[0].SetDefaults(armorAssignments.HeadItem, null);
537 this._player.armor[1].SetDefaults(armorAssignments.BodyItem, null);
538 this._player.armor[2].SetDefaults(armorAssignments.LegItem, null);
539 }
540
541 // Token: 0x06002BDE RID: 11230 RVA: 0x00592B34 File Offset: 0x00590D34
542 private void PitchSliderUpdate(UIElement affectedElement)
543 {
544 if (!this._pitchChanged)
545 {
546 return;
547 }
548 int num = this._pitchChangedCooldown - 1;
549 this._pitchChangedCooldown = num;
550 if (num > 0)
551 {
552 return;
553 }
554 this._pitchChanged = false;
555 this.PlayVoicePreview();
556 }
557
558 // Token: 0x06002BDF RID: 11231 RVA: 0x00592B6C File Offset: 0x00590D6C
559 private void PitchChanged()
560 {
561 this._pitchChanged = true;
562 this._pitchChangedCooldown = 3;
563 }
564
565 // Token: 0x06002BE0 RID: 11232 RVA: 0x00592B7C File Offset: 0x00590D7C
566 private void SetPitchSlider_GamePad()
567 {
568 if (!PlayerInput.UsingGamepad)
569 {
570 return;
571 }
572 float pitchAmount = this._pitchAmount;
573 float num = UILinksInitializer.HandleSliderHorizontalInput(Utils.Remap(this._pitchAmount, -1f, 1f, 0f, 1f, true), 0f, 1f, PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InterfaceDeadzoneX, 0.35f);
574 this._pitchAmount = Utils.Remap(num, 0f, 1f, -1f, 1f, true);
575 num = this.RemapPitchSliderKnob(num);
576 this._player.voicePitchOffset = Utils.Remap(num, 0f, 1f, -1f, 1f, true);
577 if (pitchAmount != this._pitchAmount)
578 {
579 this.PitchChanged();
580 }
581 }
582
583 // Token: 0x06002BE1 RID: 11233 RVA: 0x00592C34 File Offset: 0x00590E34
584 private float RemapPitchSliderKnob(float pitchSliderValue)
585 {
586 int num = 20;
587 return (float)Math.Round((double)(pitchSliderValue * (float)num)) / (float)num;
588 }
589
590 // Token: 0x06002BE2 RID: 11234 RVA: 0x00592C54 File Offset: 0x00590E54
591 private void SetPitchSlider_Keyboard(float amount)
592 {
593 amount = this.RemapPitchSliderKnob(amount);
594 float voicePitchOffset = this._player.voicePitchOffset;
595 this._pitchAmount = (this._player.voicePitchOffset = Utils.Remap(amount, 0f, 1f, -1f, 1f, true));
596 this._pitchChangedCooldown = 3;
597 if (voicePitchOffset != this._player.voicePitchOffset)
598 {
599 this.PitchChanged();
600 }
601 }
602
603 // Token: 0x06002BE3 RID: 11235 RVA: 0x00592CBE File Offset: 0x00590EBE
604 private float GetPitchSlider()
605 {
606 return Utils.Remap(this.RemapPitchSliderKnob(this._pitchAmount), -1f, 1f, 0f, 1f, true);
607 }
608
609 // Token: 0x06002BE4 RID: 11236 RVA: 0x00592CE8 File Offset: 0x00590EE8
610 private Color GetVoicePitchColorAt(float x)
611 {
612 float num = (x * 4f + 0.5f) % 1f;
613 float num2 = Utils.Remap(num, 0f, 0.5f, 0f, 1f, true) * Utils.Remap(num, 0.5f, 1f, 1f, 0f, true);
614 float num3 = num2 * num2 * num2 * num2 * num2;
615 return Color.Lerp(new Color(90, 90, 120), Color.White, num3);
616 }
617
618 // Token: 0x06002BE5 RID: 11237 RVA: 0x00592D64 File Offset: 0x00590F64
619 private void voiceNumber_OnUpdate(UIElement affectedElement)
620 {
621 int num = 0;
622 int[] variantOrder = PlayerVoiceID.VariantOrder;
623 for (int i = 0; i < variantOrder.Length; i++)
624 {
625 if (variantOrder[i] == this._player.voiceVariant)
626 {
627 num = i;
628 break;
629 }
630 }
631 (affectedElement as UIText).SetText((num + 1).ToString());
632 }
633
634 // Token: 0x06002BE6 RID: 11238 RVA: 0x00592DB1 File Offset: 0x00590FB1
635 private void voiceIcon_OnUpdate(UIElement affectedElement)
636 {
637 (affectedElement as UIImage).Color = PlayerVoiceID.Sets.Colors[this._player.voiceVariant];

654 this._clothingStylesCategoryButton = this.CreatePickerWithoutClick(UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.Clothing, "Images/UI/CharCreation/ClothStyleMale", num, num2);
655 this._clothingStylesCategoryButton.OnLeftMouseDown += this.Click_ClothStyles;
656 this._clothingStylesCategoryButton.SetSnapPoint("Top", 1, null, null);
657 categoryContainer.Append(this._clothingStylesCategoryButton);

672 this._hairStylesCategoryButton.OnLeftMouseDown += this.Click_HairStyles;

677 this._charInfoCategoryButton.OnLeftMouseDown += this.Click_CharInfo;
678 this._charInfoCategoryButton.SetSnapPoint("Top", 0, null, null);
679 categoryContainer.Append(this._charInfoCategoryButton);

682 {
683 Width = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(-25f, 1f),
684 Top = StyleDimension.FromPixels(6f),
685 Left = new StyleDimension(-2.5f, 0f),
686 VAlign = 1f,
687 HAlign = 0.5f,
688 Color = Color.Lerp(Color.White, new Color(63, 65, 151, 255), 0.85f) * 0.9f
689 };
690 categoryContainer.Append(uihorizontalSeparator);
691 int num3 = 21;
692 UIText uitext = new UIText(PlayerInput.GenerateInputTag_ForCurrentGamemode(false, "HotbarMinus"), 1f, false)
693 {
694 Left = new StyleDimension((float)(-(float)num3), 0f),
695 VAlign = 0.5f,
696 Top = new StyleDimension(-4f, 0f)
697 };
698 categoryContainer.Append(uitext);
699 UIText uitext2 = new UIText(PlayerInput.GenerateInputTag_ForCurrentGamemode(false, "HotbarMinus"), 1f, false)
700 {
701 HAlign = 1f,
702 Left = new StyleDimension((float)(12 + num3), 0f),
703 VAlign = 0.5f,
704 Top = new StyleDimension(-4f, 0f)
705 };
706 categoryContainer.Append(uitext2);
707 this._helpGlyphLeft = uitext;
708 this._helpGlyphRight = uitext2;

712 // Token: 0x06002BE8 RID: 11240 RVA: 0x005931D8 File Offset: 0x005913D8
713 private void _clothingStylesCategoryButton_OnUpdate(UIElement affectedElement)
714 {

716 this._characterPreviewLayers[1].Color = this._player.eyeColor;
717 this._characterPreviewLayers[2].Color = this._player.skinColor;
718 this._characterPreviewLayers[3].Color = this._player.shirtColor;
719 this._characterPreviewLayers[4].Color = this._player.underShirtColor;
720 this._characterPreviewLayers[5].Color = this._player.pantsColor;

724 // Token: 0x06002BE9 RID: 11241 RVA: 0x00593290 File Offset: 0x00591490
725 private void UpdateHelpGlyphs(UIElement element)
726 {
727 string text = "";
728 string text2 = "";
729 if (PlayerInput.UsingGamepad)
730 {
731 text = PlayerInput.GenerateInputTag_ForCurrentGamemode(false, "HotbarMinus");
732 text2 = PlayerInput.GenerateInputTag_ForCurrentGamemode(false, "HotbarPlus");
733 }
734 this._helpGlyphLeft.SetText(text);
735 this._helpGlyphRight.SetText(text2);
736 }

738 // Token: 0x06002BEA RID: 11242 RVA: 0x005932E0 File Offset: 0x005914E0
739 private UIColoredImageButton CreateColorPicker(UICharacterCreation.CategoryId id, string texturePath, float xPositionStart, float xPositionPerId)
740 {
741 UIColoredImageButton uicoloredImageButton = new UIColoredImageButton(Main.Assets.Request<Texture2D>(texturePath, 1), false);
742 this._colorPickers[(int)id] = uicoloredImageButton;
743 uicoloredImageButton.VAlign = 0f;
744 uicoloredImageButton.HAlign = 0f;
745 uicoloredImageButton.Left.Set(xPositionStart + (float)id * xPositionPerId, 0.5f);
746 uicoloredImageButton.OnLeftMouseDown += this.Click_ColorPicker;
747 uicoloredImageButton.SetSnapPoint("Top", (int)id, null, null);
748 return uicoloredImageButton;
749 }
750
751 // Token: 0x06002BEB RID: 11243 RVA: 0x00593368 File Offset: 0x00591568
752 private UIColoredImageButton CreatePickerWithoutClick(UICharacterCreation.CategoryId id, string texturePath, float xPositionStart, float xPositionPerId)
753 {
754 UIColoredImageButton uicoloredImageButton = new UIColoredImageButton(Main.Assets.Request<Texture2D>(texturePath, 1), false);
755 uicoloredImageButton.VAlign = 0f;
756 uicoloredImageButton.HAlign = 0f;
757 uicoloredImageButton.Left.Set(xPositionStart + (float)id * xPositionPerId, 0.5f);
758 return uicoloredImageButton;
759 }

776 uicharacterNameButton.Width = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(0f, 1f);
777 uicharacterNameButton.HAlign = 0.5f;
778 uielement.Append(uicharacterNameButton);

784 float num3 = 0.4f;
785 UIElement uielement2 = new UIElement
786 {
787 HAlign = 0f,
788 VAlign = 1f,
789 Width = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(-num, num3),
790 Height = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(-50f, 1f)
791 };
792 uielement2.SetPadding(0f);
793 uielement.Append(uielement2);
794 UISlicedImage uislicedImage = new UISlicedImage(Main.Assets.Request<Texture2D>("Images/UI/CharCreation/CategoryPanelHighlight", 1))
795 {
796 HAlign = 1f,
797 VAlign = 1f,
798 Width = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(-num * 2f, 1f - num3),
799 Left = StyleDimension.FromPixels(-num),
800 Height = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(uielement2.Height.Pixels, uielement2.Height.Precent)
801 };
802 uislicedImage.SetSliceDepths(10);
803 uislicedImage.Color = Color.LightGray * 0.7f;
804 uielement.Append(uislicedImage);
805 float num4 = 4f;
806 UIDifficultyButton uidifficultyButton = new UIDifficultyButton(this._player, Lang.menu[26], Lang.menu[31], 0, Color.Cyan)
807 {
808 HAlign = 0f,
809 VAlign = 1f / (num4 - 1f),
810 Width = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(0f, 1f),
811 Height = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(-num2, 1f / num4)
812 };
813 UIDifficultyButton uidifficultyButton2 = new UIDifficultyButton(this._player, Lang.menu[25], Lang.menu[30], 1, Main.mcColor)
814 {
815 HAlign = 0f,
816 VAlign = 2f / (num4 - 1f),
817 Width = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(0f, 1f),
818 Height = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(-num2, 1f / num4)
819 };
820 UIDifficultyButton uidifficultyButton3 = new UIDifficultyButton(this._player, Lang.menu[24], Lang.menu[29], 2, Main.hcColor)
821 {
822 HAlign = 0f,
823 VAlign = 1f,
824 Width = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(0f, 1f),
825 Height = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(-num2, 1f / num4)
826 };
827 UIDifficultyButton uidifficultyButton4 = new UIDifficultyButton(this._player, Language.GetText("UI.Creative"), Language.GetText("UI.CreativeDescriptionPlayer"), 3, Main.creativeModeColor)
828 {
829 HAlign = 0f,
830 VAlign = 0f,
831 Width = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(0f, 1f),
832 Height = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(-num2, 1f / num4)
833 };
834 UIText uitext = new UIText(Lang.menu[26], 1f, false)
835 {
836 HAlign = 0f,
837 VAlign = 0.5f,
838 Width = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(0f, 1f),
839 Height = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(0f, 1f),
840 Top = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(15f, 0f),
841 IsWrapped = true
842 };
843 uitext.PaddingLeft = 20f;
844 uitext.PaddingRight = 20f;
845 uislicedImage.Append(uitext);
846 uielement2.Append(uidifficultyButton4);
847 uielement2.Append(uidifficultyButton);
848 uielement2.Append(uidifficultyButton2);
849 uielement2.Append(uidifficultyButton3);
850 this._infoContainer = uielement;
851 this._difficultyDescriptionText = uitext;
852 uidifficultyButton4.OnLeftMouseDown += this.UpdateDifficultyDescription;
853 uidifficultyButton.OnLeftMouseDown += this.UpdateDifficultyDescription;
854 uidifficultyButton2.OnLeftMouseDown += this.UpdateDifficultyDescription;
855 uidifficultyButton3.OnLeftMouseDown += this.UpdateDifficultyDescription;
856 this.UpdateDifficultyDescription(null, null);
857 uidifficultyButton4.SetSnapPoint("Middle", 1, null, null);
858 uidifficultyButton.SetSnapPoint("Middle", 2, null, null);
859 uidifficultyButton2.SetSnapPoint("Middle", 3, null, null);
860 uidifficultyButton3.SetSnapPoint("Middle", 4, null, null);
861 }
862
863 // Token: 0x06002BED RID: 11245 RVA: 0x005938F8 File Offset: 0x00591AF8
864 private void UpdateDifficultyDescription(UIMouseEvent evt, UIElement listeningElement)
865 {
866 LocalizedText localizedText = Lang.menu[31];
867 switch (this._player.difficulty)
868 {
869 case 0:
870 localizedText = Lang.menu[31];
871 break;
872 case 1:
873 localizedText = Lang.menu[30];
874 break;
875 case 2:
876 localizedText = Lang.menu[29];
877 break;
878 case 3:
879 localizedText = Language.GetText("UI.CreativeDescriptionPlayer");
880 break;
881 }
882 this._difficultyDescriptionText.SetText(localizedText);
883 }
884
885 // Token: 0x06002BEE RID: 11246 RVA: 0x0059396C File Offset: 0x00591B6C

889 {

891 Height = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(158f, 0f),
892 HAlign = 0.5f,
893 VAlign = 0f
894 };
895 uielement.SetPadding(0f);
896 parentContainer.Append(uielement);
897 UIElement uielement2 = new UIPanel
898 {
899 Width = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(220f, 0f),
900 Height = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(104f, 0f),
901 HAlign = 0.5f,
902 VAlign = 0f,
903 Top = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(10f, 0f)
904 };
905 uielement2.SetPadding(0f);
906 uielement2.PaddingTop = 3f;
907 uielement.Append(uielement2);
908 uielement2.Append(this.CreateHSLSlider(UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Hue));
909 uielement2.Append(this.CreateHSLSlider(UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Saturation));
910 uielement2.Append(this.CreateHSLSlider(UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Luminance));
911 UIPanel uipanel = new UIPanel
912 {
913 VAlign = 1f,
914 HAlign = 1f,
915 Width = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(100f, 0f),
916 Height = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(32f, 0f)
917 };
918 UIText uitext = new UIText("FFFFFF", 1f, false)
919 {
920 VAlign = 0.5f,
921 HAlign = 0.5f
922 };
923 uipanel.Append(uitext);
924 uielement.Append(uipanel);
925 UIColoredImageButton uicoloredImageButton = new UIColoredImageButton(Main.Assets.Request<Texture2D>("Images/UI/CharCreation/Copy", 1), true)
926 {
927 VAlign = 1f,
928 HAlign = 0f,
929 Left = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(0f, 0f)
930 };

932 uielement.Append(uicoloredImageButton);

935 {
936 VAlign = 1f,
937 HAlign = 0f,
938 Left = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(40f, 0f)
939 };
940 uicoloredImageButton2.OnLeftMouseDown += this.Click_PasteHex;
941 uielement.Append(uicoloredImageButton2);
942 this._pasteHexButton = uicoloredImageButton2;
943 UIColoredImageButton uicoloredImageButton3 = new UIColoredImageButton(Main.Assets.Request<Texture2D>("Images/UI/CharCreation/Randomize", 1), true)
944 {
945 VAlign = 1f,
946 HAlign = 0f,
947 Left = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(80f, 0f)
948 };
949 uicoloredImageButton3.OnLeftMouseDown += this.Click_RandomizeSingleColor;
950 uielement.Append(uicoloredImageButton3);
951 this._randomColorButton = uicoloredImageButton3;
952 this._hslContainer = uielement;
953 this._hslHexText = uitext;
954 uicoloredImageButton.SetSnapPoint("Low", 0, null, null);
955 uicoloredImageButton2.SetSnapPoint("Low", 1, null, null);

965 // Token: 0x06002BF0 RID: 11248 RVA: 0x00593CA8 File Offset: 0x00591EA8
966 private UIColoredSlider CreateHSLSlider(UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId id)
967 {
968 UIColoredSlider uicoloredSlider = this.CreateHSLSliderButtonBase(id);
969 uicoloredSlider.VAlign = 0f;
970 uicoloredSlider.HAlign = 0f;
971 uicoloredSlider.Width = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(-10f, 1f);
972 uicoloredSlider.Top.Set((float)((UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId)30 * id), 0f);
973 uicoloredSlider.OnLeftMouseDown += this.Click_ColorPicker;
974 uicoloredSlider.SetSnapPoint("Middle", (int)id, null, new Vector2?(new Vector2(0f, 20f)));
975 return uicoloredSlider;
976 }
977
978 // Token: 0x06002BF1 RID: 11249 RVA: 0x00593D38 File Offset: 0x00591F38
979 private UIColoredSlider CreateHSLSliderButtonBase(UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId id)
980 {
981 UIColoredSlider uicoloredSlider;
982 if (id != UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Saturation)
983 {
984 if (id != UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Luminance)
985 {
986 uicoloredSlider = new UIColoredSlider(LocalizedText.Empty, () => this.GetHSLSliderPosition(UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Hue), delegate(float x)
987 {
988 this.UpdateHSLValue(UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Hue, x);
989 }, new Action(this.UpdateHSL_H), (float x) => this.GetHSLSliderColorAt(UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Hue, x), Color.Transparent);
990 }
991 else
992 {
993 uicoloredSlider = new UIColoredSlider(LocalizedText.Empty, () => this.GetHSLSliderPosition(UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Luminance), delegate(float x)
994 {
995 this.UpdateHSLValue(UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Luminance, x);
996 }, new Action(this.UpdateHSL_L), (float x) => this.GetHSLSliderColorAt(UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Luminance, x), Color.Transparent);
997 }
998 }
999 else
1000 {
1001 uicoloredSlider = new UIColoredSlider(LocalizedText.Empty, () => this.GetHSLSliderPosition(UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Saturation), delegate(float x)
1002 {
1003 this.UpdateHSLValue(UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Saturation, x);
1004 }, new Action(this.UpdateHSL_S), (float x) => this.GetHSLSliderColorAt(UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Saturation, x), Color.Transparent);
1005 }
1006 return uicoloredSlider;
1007 }
1008
1009 // Token: 0x06002BF2 RID: 11250 RVA: 0x00593E1C File Offset: 0x0059201C
1010 private void UpdateHSL_H()
1011 {
1012 float num = UILinksInitializer.HandleSliderHorizontalInput(this._currentColorHSL.X, 0f, 1f, PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InterfaceDeadzoneX, 0.35f);
1013 this.UpdateHSLValue(UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Hue, num);
1014 }
1015
1016 // Token: 0x06002BF3 RID: 11251 RVA: 0x00593E5C File Offset: 0x0059205C
1017 private void UpdateHSL_S()
1018 {
1019 float num = UILinksInitializer.HandleSliderHorizontalInput(this._currentColorHSL.Y, 0f, 1f, PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InterfaceDeadzoneX, 0.35f);
1020 this.UpdateHSLValue(UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Saturation, num);
1021 }
1022
1023 // Token: 0x06002BF4 RID: 11252 RVA: 0x00593E9C File Offset: 0x0059209C
1024 private void UpdateHSL_L()
1025 {
1026 float num = UILinksInitializer.HandleSliderHorizontalInput(this._currentColorHSL.Z, 0f, 1f, PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InterfaceDeadzoneX, 0.35f);
1027 this.UpdateHSLValue(UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Luminance, num);
1028 }
1029
1030 // Token: 0x06002BF5 RID: 11253 RVA: 0x00593EDB File Offset: 0x005920DB
1031 private float GetHSLSliderPosition(UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId id)
1032 {
1033 switch (id)
1034 {
1035 case UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Hue:
1036 return this._currentColorHSL.X;
1037 case UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Saturation:
1038 return this._currentColorHSL.Y;
1039 case UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Luminance:
1040 return this._currentColorHSL.Z;
1041 default:
1042 return 1f;
1043 }
1044 }
1045
1046 // Token: 0x06002BF6 RID: 11254 RVA: 0x00593F1C File Offset: 0x0059211C
1047 private void UpdateHSLValue(UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId id, float value)
1048 {
1049 switch (id)
1050 {
1051 case UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Hue:
1052 this._currentColorHSL.X = value;
1053 break;
1054 case UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Saturation:
1055 this._currentColorHSL.Y = value;
1056 break;
1057 case UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Luminance:
1058 this._currentColorHSL.Z = value;
1059 break;
1060 }
1061 Color color = UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(this._currentColorHSL.X, this._currentColorHSL.Y, this._currentColorHSL.Z);
1062 this.ApplyPendingColor(color);
1063 UIColoredImageButton uicoloredImageButton = this._colorPickers[(int)this._selectedPicker];
1064 if (uicoloredImageButton != null)
1065 {
1066 uicoloredImageButton.SetColor(color);
1067 }
1068 if (this._selectedPicker == UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.HairColor)
1069 {
1070 this._hairStylesCategoryButton.SetColor(color);
1071 }
1072 this.UpdateHexText(color);
1073 }
1074
1075 // Token: 0x06002BF7 RID: 11255 RVA: 0x00593FC8 File Offset: 0x005921C8
1076 private Color GetHSLSliderColorAt(UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId id, float pointAt)
1077 {
1078 switch (id)
1079 {
1080 case UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Hue:
1081 return UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(pointAt, 1f, 0.5f);
1082 case UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Saturation:
1083 return UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(this._currentColorHSL.X, pointAt, this._currentColorHSL.Z);
1084 case UICharacterCreation.HSLSliderId.Luminance:
1085 return UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(this._currentColorHSL.X, this._currentColorHSL.Y, pointAt);
1086 default:
1087 return Color.White;
1088 }
1089 }
1090
1091 // Token: 0x06002BF8 RID: 11256 RVA: 0x0059403C File Offset: 0x0059223C
1092 private void ApplyPendingColor(Color pendingColor)
1093 {
1094 switch (this._selectedPicker)
1095 {
1096 case UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.HairColor:
1097 this._player.hairColor = pendingColor;
1098 return;
1099 case UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.Eye:
1100 this._player.eyeColor = pendingColor;
1101 return;
1102 case UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.Skin:
1103 this._player.skinColor = pendingColor;
1104 return;
1105 case UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.Shirt:
1106 this._player.shirtColor = pendingColor;
1107 return;
1108 case UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.Undershirt:
1109 this._player.underShirtColor = pendingColor;
1110 return;
1111 case UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.Pants:
1112 this._player.pantsColor = pendingColor;
1113 return;
1114 case UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.Shoes:
1115 this._player.shoeColor = pendingColor;
1116 return;
1117 default:
1118 return;
1119 }
1120 }
1121
1122 // Token: 0x06002BF9 RID: 11257 RVA: 0x005940CF File Offset: 0x005922CF
1123 private void UpdateHexText(Color pendingColor)
1124 {
1125 this._hslHexText.SetText(UICharacterCreation.GetHexText(pendingColor));
1126 }
1127
1128 // Token: 0x06002BFA RID: 11258 RVA: 0x005940E2 File Offset: 0x005922E2
1129 private static string GetHexText(Color pendingColor)
1130 {
1131 return "#" + pendingColor.Hex3().ToUpper();
1132 }
1133
1134 // Token: 0x06002BFB RID: 11259 RVA: 0x005940FC File Offset: 0x005922FC
1135 private void MakeBackAndCreatebuttons(UIElement outerContainer)
1136 {
1137 UITextPanel<LocalizedText> uitextPanel = new UITextPanel<LocalizedText>(Language.GetText("UI.Back"), 0.7f, true)
1138 {
1139 Width = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(-10f, 0.5f),
1140 Height = StyleDimension.FromPixels(50f),
1141 VAlign = 1f,
1142 HAlign = 0f,
1143 Top = StyleDimension.FromPixels(-45f)
1144 };
1145 uitextPanel.OnMouseOver += this.FadedMouseOver;
1146 uitextPanel.OnMouseOut += this.FadedMouseOut;
1147 uitextPanel.OnLeftMouseDown += this.Click_GoBack;
1148 uitextPanel.SetSnapPoint("Back", 0, null, null);
1149 outerContainer.Append(uitextPanel);
1150 UITextPanel<LocalizedText> uitextPanel2 = new UITextPanel<LocalizedText>(Language.GetText("UI.Create"), 0.7f, true)
1151 {
1152 Width = StyleDimension.FromPixelsAndPercent(-10f, 0.5f),
1153 Height = StyleDimension.FromPixels(50f),
1154 VAlign = 1f,
1155 HAlign = 1f,
1156 Top = StyleDimension.FromPixels(-45f)
1157 };
1158 uitextPanel2.OnMouseOver += this.FadedMouseOver;
1159 uitextPanel2.OnMouseOut += this.FadedMouseOut;
1160 uitextPanel2.OnLeftMouseDown += this.Click_NamingAndCreating;
1161 uitextPanel2.SetSnapPoint("Create", 0, null, null);
1162 outerContainer.Append(uitextPanel2);
1163 }
1164
1165 // Token: 0x06002BFC RID: 11260 RVA: 0x00594281 File Offset: 0x00592481

1171 // Token: 0x06002BFD RID: 11261 RVA: 0x00594288 File Offset: 0x00592488
1172 private static void GoBack()
1173 {
1174 SoundEngine.PlaySound(11, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
1175 if (UICharacterCreation.dirty)
1176 {
1177 UICharacterCreation.BackupConfirmationState = Main.MenuUI.CurrentState;
1178 Main.menuMode = 40;
1179 return;
1180 }
1181 Main.OpenCharacterSelectUI();
1182 }
1183
1184 // Token: 0x06002BFE RID: 11262 RVA: 0x005942C4 File Offset: 0x005924C4
1185 private void FadedMouseOver(UIMouseEvent evt, UIElement listeningElement)
1186 {
1187 SoundEngine.PlaySound(12, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
1188 ((UIPanel)evt.Target).BackgroundColor = new Color(73, 94, 171);
1189 ((UIPanel)evt.Target).BorderColor = Colors.FancyUIFatButtonMouseOver;
1190 }
1191
1192 // Token: 0x06002BFF RID: 11263 RVA: 0x0058539D File Offset: 0x0058359D
1193 private void FadedMouseOut(UIMouseEvent evt, UIElement listeningElement)
1194 {
1195 ((UIPanel)evt.Target).BackgroundColor = new Color(63, 82, 151) * 0.8f;
1196 ((UIPanel)evt.Target).BorderColor = Color.Black;
1197 }
1198
1199 // Token: 0x06002C00 RID: 11264 RVA: 0x0059431C File Offset: 0x0059251C
1200 private void Click_ColorPicker(UIMouseEvent evt, UIElement listeningElement)
1201 {
1202 SoundEngine.PlaySound(12, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
1203 for (int i = 0; i < this._colorPickers.Length; i++)
1204 {
1205 if (this._colorPickers[i] == evt.Target)
1206 {
1207 this.SelectColorPicker((UICharacterCreation.CategoryId)i);
1208 return;
1209 }
1210 }
1211 }
1212
1213 // Token: 0x06002C01 RID: 11265 RVA: 0x0059436C File Offset: 0x0059256C
1214 private void Click_ClothStyles(UIMouseEvent evt, UIElement listeningElement)
1215 {
1216 SoundEngine.PlaySound(12, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
1217 this.UnselectAllCategories();
1218 this._selectedPicker = UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.Clothing;
1219 this._middleContainer.Append(this._clothStylesContainer);
1220 this._clothingStylesCategoryButton.SetSelected(true);
1221 }
1222
1223 // Token: 0x06002C02 RID: 11266 RVA: 0x005943B8 File Offset: 0x005925B8
1224 private void Click_HairStyles(UIMouseEvent evt, UIElement listeningElement)
1225 {

1227 this.UnselectAllCategories();
1228 this._selectedPicker = UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.HairStyle;
1229 this._middleContainer.Append(this._hairstylesContainer);
1230 this._hairStylesCategoryButton.SetSelected(true);

1232
1233 // Token: 0x06002C03 RID: 11267 RVA: 0x00594404 File Offset: 0x00592604
1234 private void Click_CharInfo(UIMouseEvent evt, UIElement listeningElement)
1235 {

1243 // Token: 0x06002C04 RID: 11268 RVA: 0x00594450 File Offset: 0x00592650
1244 private void Click_CharClothStyle(UIMouseEvent evt, UIElement listeningElement)
1245 {
1246 if (this._maleArmor.HeadItem != 0 || this._maleArmor.BodyItem != 0 || this._maleArmor.LegItem != 0)
1247 {
1248 this.EquipArmorNone(evt, listeningElement);
1249 return;
1250 }
1251 UIClothStyleButton uiclothStyleButton = listeningElement as UIClothStyleButton;
1252 if (uiclothStyleButton != null)
1253 {
1254 int clothStyleId = uiclothStyleButton.ClothStyleId;
1255 this._player.skinVariant = clothStyleId;
1256 }
1257 SoundEngine.PlaySound(12, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
1258 this._clothingStylesCategoryButton.SetImageWithoutSettingSize(Main.Assets.Request<Texture2D>("Images/UI/CharCreation/" + (this._player.Male ? "ClothStyleMale" : "ClothStyleFemale"), 1));
1259 this.UpdateSelectedGender();
1260 }
1261
1262 // Token: 0x06002C05 RID: 11269 RVA: 0x00594500 File Offset: 0x00592700
1263 private void TryChangingVoice()
1264 {
1265 if (this._player.Male && this._player.voiceVariant == 2)
1266 {
1267 this._player.voiceVariant = 1;
1268 }
1269 if (!this._player.Male && this._player.voiceVariant == 1)
1270 {
1271 this._player.voiceVariant = 2;
1272 }
1273 }
1274
1275 // Token: 0x06002C06 RID: 11270 RVA: 0x0059455C File Offset: 0x0059275C
1276 private void UpdateSelectedGender()
1277 {
1278 if (this._oldMaleForVoiceAutoSwitch == this._player.Male)
1279 {
1280 this.PlayVoicePreview();
1281 return;
1282 }
1283 int voiceVariant = this._player.voiceVariant;
1284 if (voiceVariant != 1)
1285 {
1286 if (voiceVariant == 2)
1287 {
1288 if (!this._oldMaleForVoiceAutoSwitch)
1289 {
1290 this._player.voiceVariant = 1;
1291 }
1292 }
1293 }
1294 else if (this._oldMaleForVoiceAutoSwitch)
1295 {
1296 this._player.voiceVariant = 2;
1297 }
1298 this._oldMaleForVoiceAutoSwitch = this._player.Male;
1299 this.PlayVoicePreview();
1300 }
1301
1302 // Token: 0x06002C07 RID: 11271 RVA: 0x005945DA File Offset: 0x005927DA
1303 private void Click_CopyHex(UIMouseEvent evt, UIElement listeningElement)
1304 {
1305 SoundEngine.PlaySound(12, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
1306 Platform.Get<IClipboard>().Value = this._hslHexText.Text;
1307 }
1308
1309 // Token: 0x06002C08 RID: 11272 RVA: 0x00594608 File Offset: 0x00592808
1310 private void Click_PasteHex(UIMouseEvent evt, UIElement listeningElement)
1311 {
1312 SoundEngine.PlaySound(12, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
1313 string value = Platform.Get<IClipboard>().Value;
1314 Vector3 vector;
1315 if (this.GetHexColor(value, out vector))
1316 {
1317 this.ApplyPendingColor(UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(vector.X, vector.Y, vector.Z));
1318 this._currentColorHSL = vector;
1319 this.UpdateHexText(UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(vector.X, vector.Y, vector.Z));
1320 this.UpdateColorPickers();
1321 }
1322 }
1323
1324 // Token: 0x06002C09 RID: 11273 RVA: 0x00594688 File Offset: 0x00592888
1325 private string GetPlayerTemplateValues()
1326 {
1327 string text = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(new Dictionary<string, object>
1328 {
1329 { "version", 1 },
1330 {
1331 "hairStyle",
1332 this._player.hair
1333 },
1334 {
1335 "clothingStyle",
1336 this._player.skinVariant
1337 },
1338 {
1339 "voiceStyle",
1340 this._player.voiceVariant
1341 },
1342 {
1343 "voicePitch",
1344 this._player.voicePitchOffset
1345 },
1346 {
1347 "hairColor",
1348 UICharacterCreation.GetHexText(this._player.hairColor)
1349 },
1350 {
1351 "eyeColor",
1352 UICharacterCreation.GetHexText(this._player.eyeColor)
1353 },
1354 {
1355 "skinColor",
1356 UICharacterCreation.GetHexText(this._player.skinColor)
1357 },
1358 {
1359 "shirtColor",
1360 UICharacterCreation.GetHexText(this._player.shirtColor)
1361 },
1362 {
1363 "underShirtColor",
1364 UICharacterCreation.GetHexText(this._player.underShirtColor)
1365 },
1366 {
1367 "pantsColor",
1368 UICharacterCreation.GetHexText(this._player.pantsColor)
1369 },
1370 {
1371 "shoeColor",
1372 UICharacterCreation.GetHexText(this._player.shoeColor)
1373 }
1374 }, new JsonSerializerSettings
1375 {
1376 TypeNameHandling = 4,
1377 MetadataPropertyHandling = 1,
1378 Formatting = 1
1379 });
1380 PlayerInput.PrettyPrintProfiles(ref text);
1381 return text;
1382 }
1383
1384 // Token: 0x06002C0A RID: 11274 RVA: 0x005947FC File Offset: 0x005929FC

1391 // Token: 0x06002C0B RID: 11275 RVA: 0x00594824 File Offset: 0x00592A24
1392 private void Click_PastePlayerTemplate(UIMouseEvent evt, UIElement listeningElement)
1393 {
1394 SoundEngine.PlaySound(12, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
1395 try
1396 {
1397 string text = Platform.Get<IClipboard>().Value;
1398 int num = text.IndexOf("{");
1399 if (num != -1)
1400 {
1401 text = text.Substring(num);
1402 int num2 = text.LastIndexOf("}");
1403 if (num2 != -1)
1404 {
1405 text = text.Substring(0, num2 + 1);
1406 Dictionary<string, object> dictionary = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<Dictionary<string, object>>(text);
1407 if (dictionary != null)
1408 {
1409 Dictionary<string, object> dictionary2 = new Dictionary<string, object>();
1410 foreach (KeyValuePair<string, object> keyValuePair in dictionary)
1411 {
1412 dictionary2[keyValuePair.Key.ToLower()] = keyValuePair.Value;
1413 }
1414 object obj;
1415 if (dictionary2.TryGetValue("version", out obj))
1416 {
1417 long num3 = (long)obj;
1418 }
1419 if (dictionary2.TryGetValue("hairstyle", out obj))
1420 {
1421 int num4 = (int)((long)obj);
1422 if (Main.Hairstyles.AvailableHairstyles.Contains(num4))
1423 {
1424 this._player.hair = num4;
1425 this._lastSelectedHairstyle = new int?(num4);
1426 }
1427 }
1428 if (dictionary2.TryGetValue("clothingstyle", out obj))
1429 {
1430 int num5 = (int)((long)obj);
1431 if (this._validClothStyles.Contains(num5))
1432 {
1433 this._player.skinVariant = num5;
1434 }
1435 }
1436 if (dictionary2.TryGetValue("voicestyle", out obj))
1437 {
1438 int num6 = (int)((long)obj);
1439 if (this._validVoiceStyles.Contains(num6))
1440 {
1441 this._player.voiceVariant = num6;
1442 }
1443 }
1444 if (dictionary2.TryGetValue("voicepitch", out obj))
1445 {
1446 float num7 = (float)((double)obj);
1447 this._player.voicePitchOffset = num7;
1448 this._pitchAmount = num7;
1449 }
1450 Vector3 vector;
1451 if (dictionary2.TryGetValue("haircolor", out obj) && this.GetHexColor((string)obj, out vector))
1452 {
1453 this._player.hairColor = UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(vector);
1454 }
1455 if (dictionary2.TryGetValue("eyecolor", out obj) && this.GetHexColor((string)obj, out vector))
1456 {
1457 this._player.eyeColor = UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(vector);
1458 }
1459 if (dictionary2.TryGetValue("skincolor", out obj) && this.GetHexColor((string)obj, out vector))
1460 {
1461 this._player.skinColor = UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(vector);
1462 }
1463 if (dictionary2.TryGetValue("shirtcolor", out obj) && this.GetHexColor((string)obj, out vector))
1464 {
1465 this._player.shirtColor = UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(vector);
1466 }
1467 if (dictionary2.TryGetValue("undershirtcolor", out obj) && this.GetHexColor((string)obj, out vector))
1468 {
1469 this._player.underShirtColor = UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(vector);
1470 }
1471 if (dictionary2.TryGetValue("pantscolor", out obj) && this.GetHexColor((string)obj, out vector))
1472 {
1473 this._player.pantsColor = UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(vector);
1474 }
1475 if (dictionary2.TryGetValue("shoecolor", out obj) && this.GetHexColor((string)obj, out vector))
1476 {
1477 this._player.shoeColor = UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(vector);
1478 }
1479 this.Click_CharClothStyle(null, null);
1480 this.UpdateColorPickers();
1481 }
1482 }
1483 }
1484 }
1485 catch
1486 {
1487 }
1488 }
1489

1496 // Token: 0x06002C0D RID: 11277 RVA: 0x00594B94 File Offset: 0x00592D94
1497 private void PlayVoicePreview()
1498 {
1499 if (this._playedVoicePreviewThisFrame)
1500 {
1501 return;
1502 }
1503 this._playedVoicePreviewThisFrame = true;
1504 Vector2 position = this._player.position;
1505 this._player.position = new Vector2(-1f, -1f);
1506 this._player.PlayHurtSound();
1507 this._player.position = position;
1508 }

1529 // Token: 0x06002C11 RID: 11281 RVA: 0x00594C18 File Offset: 0x00592E18
1530 private void Click_RandomizePlayer(UIMouseEvent evt, UIElement listeningElement)
1531 {
1532 SoundEngine.PlaySound(12, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
1533 Player player = this._player;
1534 int num = Main.rand.Next(Main.Hairstyles.AvailableHairstyles.Count);
1535 player.hair = Main.Hairstyles.AvailableHairstyles[num];
1536 this._lastSelectedHairstyle = new int?(player.hair);
1537 player.eyeColor = UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(UICharacterCreation.GetRandomColorVector());
1538 while ((int)(player.eyeColor.R + player.eyeColor.G + player.eyeColor.B) > 300)
1539 {
1540 player.eyeColor = UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(UICharacterCreation.GetRandomColorVector());
1541 }
1542 float num2 = (float)Main.rand.Next(60, 120) * 0.01f;
1543 if (num2 > 1f)
1544 {
1545 num2 = 1f;
1546 }
1547 player.skinColor.R = (byte)((float)Main.rand.Next(240, 255) * num2);
1548 player.skinColor.G = (byte)((float)Main.rand.Next(110, 140) * num2);
1549 player.skinColor.B = (byte)((float)Main.rand.Next(75, 110) * num2);
1550 player.hairColor = UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(UICharacterCreation.GetRandomColorVector());
1551 player.shirtColor = UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(UICharacterCreation.GetRandomColorVector());
1552 player.underShirtColor = UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(UICharacterCreation.GetRandomColorVector());
1553 player.pantsColor = UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(UICharacterCreation.GetRandomColorVector());
1554 player.shoeColor = UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(UICharacterCreation.GetRandomColorVector());
1555 player.skinVariant = this._validClothStyles[Main.rand.Next(this._validClothStyles.Length)];
1556 player.voiceVariant = (player.Male ? 1 : 2);
1557 if (Main.rand.Next(2) == 0)
1558 {
1559 player.voiceVariant = 3;
1560 }
1561 int num3 = player.hair + 1;
1562 if (num3 <= 135)
1563 {
1564 if (num3 <= 124)
1565 {
1566 switch (num3)
1567 {
1568 case 5:
1569 case 6:
1570 case 7:
1571 case 10:
1572 case 12:
1573 case 19:
1574 case 22:
1575 case 23:
1576 case 26:
1577 case 27:
1578 case 30:
1579 case 33:
1580 case 34:
1581 case 35:
1582 case 37:
1583 case 38:
1584 case 39:
1585 case 40:
1586 case 41:
1587 case 44:
1588 case 45:
1589 case 46:
1590 case 47:
1591 case 48:
1592 case 49:
1593 case 51:
1594 case 56:
1595 case 65:
1596 case 66:
1597 case 67:
1598 case 68:
1599 case 69:
1600 case 70:
1601 case 71:
1602 case 72:
1603 case 73:

1605 case 79:
1606 case 80:
1607 case 81:
1608 case 82:
1609 case 84:
1610 case 85:
1611 case 86:
1612 case 87:
1613 case 88:
1614 case 90:
1615 case 91:
1616 case 92:
1617 case 93:
1618 case 95:
1619 case 96:
1620 case 98:
1621 case 100:
1622 case 102:
1623 case 104:
1624 case 107:
1625 case 108:
1626 case 113:
1627 break;
1628 case 8:
1629 case 9:
1630 case 11:
1631 case 13:
1632 case 14:
1633 case 15:
1634 case 16:
1635 case 17:
1636 case 18:
1637 case 20:
1638 case 21:
1639 case 24:
1640 case 25:
1641 case 28:
1642 case 29:
1643 case 31:
1644 case 32:
1645 case 36:
1646 case 42:
1647 case 43:
1648 case 50:
1649 case 52:
1650 case 53:
1651 case 54:
1652 case 55:
1653 case 57:
1654 case 58:
1655 case 59:
1656 case 60:
1657 case 61:
1658 case 62:
1659 case 63:
1660 case 64:
1661 case 75:
1662 case 76:
1663 case 77:
1664 case 78:
1665 case 83:
1666 case 89:
1667 case 94:
1668 case 97:
1669 case 99:
1670 case 101:
1671 case 103:
1672 case 105:
1673 case 106:
1674 case 109:
1675 case 110:
1676 case 111:
1677 case 112:
1678 goto IL_03E7;
1679 default:
1680 if (num3 != 124)
1681 {
1682 goto IL_03E7;
1683 }
1684 break;
1685 }
1686 }
1687 else if (num3 != 126 && num3 - 133 > 2)
1688 {
1689 goto IL_03E7;
1690 }
1691 }
1692 else if (num3 <= 147)
1693 {
1694 if (num3 != 144 && num3 - 146 > 1)
1695 {
1696 goto IL_03E7;
1697 }
1698 }
1699 else if (num3 != 163 && num3 != 165)
1700 {
1701 goto IL_03E7;
1702 }
1703 player.Male = false;
1704 goto IL_03EE;
1705 IL_03E7:
1706 player.Male = true;
1707 IL_03EE:
1708 this._femaleArmor = (this._maleArmor = default(UICharacterCreation.ArmorAssignments));
1709 this.Click_CharClothStyle(null, null);
1710 this.UpdateSelectedGender();
1711 this.UpdateColorPickers();
1712 }

1714 // Token: 0x06002C12 RID: 11282 RVA: 0x00595044 File Offset: 0x00593244
1715 private void Click_Naming(UIMouseEvent evt, UIElement listeningElement)
1716 {
1717 SoundEngine.PlaySound(10, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
1718 this._player.name = "";
1719 Main.clrInput();
1720 UIVirtualKeyboard uivirtualKeyboard = new UIVirtualKeyboard(Lang.menu[45].Value, "", new UIVirtualKeyboard.KeyboardSubmitEvent(this.OnFinishedNaming), new Action(this.OnCanceledNaming), 0, true, 20);
1721 Main.MenuUI.SetState(uivirtualKeyboard);
1722 }
1723
1724 // Token: 0x06002C13 RID: 11283 RVA: 0x005950BC File Offset: 0x005932BC
1725 private void Click_NamingAndCreating(UIMouseEvent evt, UIElement listeningElement)
1726 {

1729 {
1730 this._player.name = "";

1737 }

1739 // Token: 0x06002C14 RID: 11284 RVA: 0x0059514B File Offset: 0x0059334B

1772 // Token: 0x06002C18 RID: 11288 RVA: 0x005951EC File Offset: 0x005933EC
1773 private void SetupPlayerStatsAndInventoryBasedOnDifficulty()
1774 {
1775 this._femaleArmor = (this._maleArmor = default(UICharacterCreation.ArmorAssignments));
1776 this.UpdatePreviewItems();
1777 int num = 0;
1778 byte difficulty = this._player.difficulty;
1779 if (difficulty == 3)
1780 {
1781 this._player.statLife = (this._player.statLifeMax = 100);
1782 this._player.statMana = (this._player.statManaMax = 20);
1783 this._player.inventory[num].SetDefaults(6, null);
1784 this._player.inventory[num++].Prefix(-1);
1785 this._player.inventory[num].SetDefaults(1, null);
1786 this._player.inventory[num++].Prefix(-1);
1787 this._player.inventory[num].SetDefaults(10, null);
1788 this._player.inventory[num++].Prefix(-1);
1789 this._player.inventory[num].SetDefaults(7, null);
1790 this._player.inventory[num++].Prefix(-1);
1791 this._player.inventory[num].SetDefaults(4281, null);
1792 this._player.inventory[num++].Prefix(-1);
1793 this._player.inventory[num].SetDefaults(8, null);
1794 this._player.inventory[num++].stack = 100;
1795 this._player.inventory[num].SetDefaults(965, null);
1796 this._player.inventory[num++].stack = 100;
1797 this._player.inventory[num++].SetDefaults(50, null);
1798 this._player.inventory[num++].SetDefaults(84, null);
1799 this._player.armor[3].SetDefaults(4978, null);
1800 this._player.armor[3].Prefix(-1);
1801 string text = this._player.name.ToLower();
1802 if (text == "wolf pet" || text == "wolfpet")
1803 {
1804 this._player.miscEquips[3].SetDefaults(5130, null);
1805 }
1806 this._player.AddBuff(216, 3600, false);
1807 }
1808 else
1809 {
1810 this._player.inventory[num].SetDefaults(3507, null);
1811 this._player.inventory[num++].Prefix(-1);
1812 this._player.inventory[num].SetDefaults(3509, null);
1813 this._player.inventory[num++].Prefix(-1);
1814 this._player.inventory[num].SetDefaults(3506, null);
1815 this._player.inventory[num++].Prefix(-1);
1816 }
1817 if (Main.runningCollectorsEdition)
1818 {
1819 this._player.inventory[num++].SetDefaults(603, null);
1820 }
1821 this._player.savedPerPlayerFieldsThatArentInThePlayerClass = new Player.SavedPlayerDataWithAnnoyingRules();
1822 CreativePowerManager.Instance.ResetDataForNewPlayer(this._player);
1823 }
1824
1825 // Token: 0x06002C19 RID: 11289 RVA: 0x00595534 File Offset: 0x00593734
1826 private bool GetHexColor(string hexString, out Vector3 hsl)
1827 {
1828 if (hexString.StartsWith("#"))
1829 {
1830 hexString = hexString.Substring(1);
1831 }
1832 uint num;
1833 if (hexString.Length <= 6 && uint.TryParse(hexString, NumberStyles.HexNumber, CultureInfo.CurrentCulture, out num))
1834 {
1835 uint num2 = num & 255U;
1836 uint num3 = (num >> 8) & 255U;
1837 uint num4 = (num >> 16) & 255U;
1838 hsl = UICharacterCreation.RgbToScaledHsl(new Color((int)num4, (int)num3, (int)num2));
1839 return true;
1840 }
1841 hsl = Vector3.Zero;
1842 return false;
1843 }
1844
1845 // Token: 0x06002C1A RID: 11290 RVA: 0x005955B4 File Offset: 0x005937B4
1846 private void Click_RandomizeSingleColor(UIMouseEvent evt, UIElement listeningElement)
1847 {
1848 SoundEngine.PlaySound(12, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
1849 Vector3 randomColorVector = UICharacterCreation.GetRandomColorVector();
1850 this.ApplyPendingColor(UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(randomColorVector.X, randomColorVector.Y, randomColorVector.Z));
1851 this._currentColorHSL = randomColorVector;
1852 this.UpdateHexText(UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(randomColorVector.X, randomColorVector.Y, randomColorVector.Z));
1853 this.UpdateColorPickers();
1854 }
1855
1856 // Token: 0x06002C1B RID: 11291 RVA: 0x00595623 File Offset: 0x00593823
1857 private static Vector3 GetRandomColorVector()
1858 {
1859 return new Vector3(Main.rand.NextFloat(), Main.rand.NextFloat(), Main.rand.NextFloat());
1860 }

1862 // Token: 0x06002C1C RID: 11292 RVA: 0x00595648 File Offset: 0x00593848
1863 private void UnselectAllCategories()
1864 {
1865 foreach (UIColoredImageButton uicoloredImageButton in this._colorPickers)
1866 {
1867 if (uicoloredImageButton != null)
1868 {
1869 uicoloredImageButton.SetSelected(false);
1870 }
1871 }
1872 this._clothingStylesCategoryButton.SetSelected(false);
1873 this._hairStylesCategoryButton.SetSelected(false);
1874 this._charInfoCategoryButton.SetSelected(false);
1875 this._hslContainer.Remove();
1876 this._hairstylesContainer.Remove();
1877 this._clothStylesContainer.Remove();
1878 this._infoContainer.Remove();

1881 // Token: 0x06002C1D RID: 11293 RVA: 0x005956C8 File Offset: 0x005938C8
1882 private void SelectColorPicker(UICharacterCreation.CategoryId selection)
1883 {
1884 this._selectedPicker = selection;
1885 if (selection == UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.CharInfo)
1886 {
1887 this.Click_CharInfo(null, null);
1888 return;
1889 }
1890 if (selection == UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.Clothing)
1891 {
1892 this.Click_ClothStyles(null, null);
1893 return;
1894 }
1895 if (selection == UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.HairStyle)
1896 {
1897 this.Click_HairStyles(null, null);
1898 return;
1899 }
1900 this.UnselectAllCategories();
1901 this._middleContainer.Append(this._hslContainer);
1902 for (int i = 0; i < this._colorPickers.Length; i++)
1903 {
1904 if (this._colorPickers[i] != null)
1905 {
1906 this._colorPickers[i].SetSelected(i == (int)selection);
1907 }
1908 }
1909 Vector3 vector = Vector3.One;
1910 switch (this._selectedPicker)
1911 {
1912 case UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.HairColor:
1913 vector = UICharacterCreation.RgbToScaledHsl(this._player.hairColor);
1914 break;
1915 case UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.Eye:
1916 vector = UICharacterCreation.RgbToScaledHsl(this._player.eyeColor);
1917 break;
1918 case UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.Skin:
1919 vector = UICharacterCreation.RgbToScaledHsl(this._player.skinColor);
1920 break;
1921 case UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.Shirt:
1922 vector = UICharacterCreation.RgbToScaledHsl(this._player.shirtColor);
1923 break;
1924 case UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.Undershirt:
1925 vector = UICharacterCreation.RgbToScaledHsl(this._player.underShirtColor);
1926 break;
1927 case UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.Pants:
1928 vector = UICharacterCreation.RgbToScaledHsl(this._player.pantsColor);
1929 break;
1930 case UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.Shoes:
1931 vector = UICharacterCreation.RgbToScaledHsl(this._player.shoeColor);
1932 break;
1933 }
1934 this._currentColorHSL = vector;
1935 this.UpdateHexText(UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(vector.X, vector.Y, vector.Z));
1936 }
1937
1938 // Token: 0x06002C1E RID: 11294 RVA: 0x00595824 File Offset: 0x00593A24
1939 private void UpdateColorPickers()
1940 {
1941 UICharacterCreation.CategoryId selectedPicker = this._selectedPicker;
1942 this._colorPickers[3].SetColor(this._player.hairColor);
1943 this._hairStylesCategoryButton.SetColor(this._player.hairColor);
1944 this._colorPickers[4].SetColor(this._player.eyeColor);
1945 this._colorPickers[5].SetColor(this._player.skinColor);
1946 this._colorPickers[6].SetColor(this._player.shirtColor);
1947 this._colorPickers[7].SetColor(this._player.underShirtColor);
1948 this._colorPickers[8].SetColor(this._player.pantsColor);
1949 this._colorPickers[9].SetColor(this._player.shoeColor);
1950 }
1951
1952 // Token: 0x06002C1F RID: 11295 RVA: 0x005958F8 File Offset: 0x00593AF8
1953 public override void Draw(SpriteBatch spriteBatch)
1954 {
1955 base.Draw(spriteBatch);

1957 if (this._copyHexButton.IsMouseHovering)
1958 {
1959 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.CopyColorToClipboard");
1960 }
1961 if (this._pasteHexButton.IsMouseHovering)
1962 {
1963 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PasteColorFromClipboard");
1964 }
1965 if (this._randomColorButton.IsMouseHovering)
1966 {
1967 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.RandomizeColor");
1968 }
1969 if (this._copyTemplateButton.IsMouseHovering)
1970 {
1971 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.CopyPlayerToClipboard");
1972 }
1973 if (this._pasteTemplateButton.IsMouseHovering)
1974 {
1975 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PastePlayerFromClipboard");
1976 }
1977 if (this._randomizePlayerButton.IsMouseHovering)
1978 {
1979 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.RandomizePlayer");
1980 }
1981 if (this._previewArmorButton[0].IsMouseHovering)
1982 {
1983 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PreviewArmorNone");
1984 }
1985 if (this._previewArmorButton[1].IsMouseHovering)
1986 {
1987 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PreviewArmorHallowed");
1988 }
1989 if (this._previewArmorButton[2].IsMouseHovering)
1990 {
1991 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PreviewArmorSilver");
1992 }
1993 if (this._previewArmorButton[3].IsMouseHovering)
1994 {
1995 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PreviewArmorFormal");
1996 }
1997 if (this._previewArmorButton[4].IsMouseHovering)
1998 {
1999 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PreviewArmorSwimming");
2000 }
2001 if (UISliderBase.CurrentAimedSlider == this._pitchSlider)
2002 {
2003 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PlayerCreateVoicePitch");
2004 }
2005 if (this._voicePrevious.IsMouseHovering)
2006 {
2007 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PlayerCreateVoicePrev");
2008 }
2009 if (this._voiceNext.IsMouseHovering)
2010 {
2011 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PlayerCreateVoiceNext");
2012 }
2013 if (this._voicePlay.IsMouseHovering)
2014 {
2015 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PlayerCreateVoicePlay");
2016 }
2017 if (this._charInfoCategoryButton.IsMouseHovering)
2018 {
2019 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PlayerCreateCategoryInfo");
2020 }
2021 if (this._clothingStylesCategoryButton.IsMouseHovering)
2022 {
2023 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PlayerCreateCategoryBodyStyle");
2024 }
2025 if (this._hairStylesCategoryButton.IsMouseHovering)
2026 {
2027 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PlayerCreateCategoryHairStyle");
2028 }
2029 if (this._colorPickers[3].IsMouseHovering)
2030 {
2031 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PlayerCreateCategoryHairColor");
2032 }
2033 if (this._colorPickers[4].IsMouseHovering)
2034 {
2035 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PlayerCreateCategoryEyeColor");
2036 }
2037 if (this._colorPickers[5].IsMouseHovering)
2038 {
2039 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PlayerCreateCategorySkinColor");
2040 }
2041 if (this._colorPickers[6].IsMouseHovering)
2042 {
2043 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PlayerCreateCategoryShirtColor");
2044 }
2045 if (this._colorPickers[7].IsMouseHovering)
2046 {
2047 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PlayerCreateCategoryUndershirtColor");
2048 }
2049 if (this._colorPickers[8].IsMouseHovering)
2050 {
2051 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PlayerCreateCategoryPantsColor");
2052 }
2053 if (this._colorPickers[9].IsMouseHovering)
2054 {
2055 text = Language.GetTextValue("UI.PlayerCreateCategoryShoesColor");
2056 }
2057 if (text != null)
2058 {
2059 float x = FontAssets.MouseText.Value.MeasureString(text).X;
2060 Vector2 vector = new Vector2((float)Main.mouseX, (float)Main.mouseY) + new Vector2(16f);
2061 if (vector.Y > (float)(Main.screenHeight - 30))
2062 {
2063 vector.Y = (float)(Main.screenHeight - 30);
2064 }
2065 if (vector.X > (float)Main.screenWidth - x)
2066 {
2067 vector.X = (float)(Main.screenWidth - 460);
2068 }
2069 Utils.DrawBorderStringFourWay(spriteBatch, FontAssets.MouseText.Value, text, vector.X, vector.Y, new Color((int)Main.mouseTextColor, (int)Main.mouseTextColor, (int)Main.mouseTextColor, (int)Main.mouseTextColor), Color.Black, Vector2.Zero, 1f);
2070 }
2071 this.SetupGamepadPoints(spriteBatch);
2072 this._tips.Update();
2073 int num = Main.screenHeight - 560;
2074 if (num < 0)
2075 {
2076 num = 0;
2077 }
2078 int num2 = 150;
2079 if (num < 300)
2080 {
2081 num2 = num / 2;
2082 }
2083 if (num > 30)
2084 {
2085 this._tips.TipOffsetY = (float)(-(float)num2);
2086 this._tips.Draw();
2087 }
2088 if (!UICharacterCreation.dirty)
2089 {
2090 if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(this._player.name))
2091 {
2092 UICharacterCreation.dirty = true;
2093 }
2094 if (this.GetPlayerTemplateValues() != this.initialState)
2095 {
2096 UICharacterCreation.dirty = true;
2097 }
2098 }
2099 }

2324 {
2325 List<SnapPoint> list5 = snapPoints.Where((SnapPoint a) => a.Name == "Low").ToList<SnapPoint>();
2326 list5.Sort(new Comparison<SnapPoint>(this.SortPoints));
2327 num3 = num2 + 20;
2328 for (int num9 = 0; num9 < list5.Count; num9++)
2329 {
2330 UILinkPoint andSet6 = this.GetAndSet(num3, list5[num9]);
2331 andSet6.Up = num2 + 2;
2332 andSet6.Down = uilinkPoint.ID;
2333 andSet6.Left = andSet6.ID - 1;
2334 andSet6.Right = andSet6.ID + 1;
2335 if (num9 == 0)
2336 {
2337 andSet6.Left = andSet6.ID + 2;
2338 uilinkPoint.Up = andSet6.ID;
2339 }
2340 if (num9 == list5.Count - 1)
2341 {
2342 andSet6.Right = andSet6.ID - 2;
2343 uilinkPoint2.Up = andSet6.ID;
2344 }
2345 this._foundPoints.Add(num3);
2346 num3++;
2347 }
2348 num3 = num2;
2349 for (int num10 = 0; num10 < list2.Count; num10++)
2350 {
2351 UILinkPoint andSet7 = this.GetAndSet(num3, list2[num10]);
2352 andSet7.Up = andSet7.ID - 1;
2353 andSet7.Down = andSet7.ID + 1;
2354 if (num10 == 0)
2355 {
2356 andSet7.Up = num + 2 + 5;
2357 }
2358 if (num10 == list2.Count - 1)
2359 {
2360 andSet7.Down = num2 + 20 + 2;
2361 }
2362 this._foundPoints.Add(num3);
2363 num3++;
2364 }
2365 break;
2366 }
2367 }
2368 if (PlayerInput.UsingGamepadUI && !this._foundPoints.Contains(UILinkPointNavigator.CurrentPoint))
2369 {
2370 this.MoveToVisuallyClosestPoint();
2371 }
2372 }
2373
2374 // Token: 0x06002C21 RID: 11297 RVA: 0x00596684 File Offset: 0x00594884
2375 private void MoveToVisuallyClosestPoint()
2376 {
2377 Dictionary<int, UILinkPoint> points = UILinkPointNavigator.Points;
2378 Vector2 mouseScreen = Main.MouseScreen;
2379 UILinkPoint uilinkPoint = null;
2380 foreach (int num in this._foundPoints)
2381 {
2382 UILinkPoint uilinkPoint2;
2383 if (!points.TryGetValue(num, out uilinkPoint2))
2384 {
2385 return;
2386 }
2387 if (uilinkPoint == null || Vector2.Distance(mouseScreen, uilinkPoint.Position) > Vector2.Distance(mouseScreen, uilinkPoint2.Position))
2388 {
2389 uilinkPoint = uilinkPoint2;
2390 }
2391 }
2392 if (uilinkPoint != null)
2393 {
2394 UILinkPointNavigator.ChangePoint(uilinkPoint.ID);
2395 }
2396 }
2397
2398 // Token: 0x06002C22 RID: 11298 RVA: 0x0059671C File Offset: 0x0059491C
2399 public void TryMovingCategory(int direction)
2400 {
2401 int num = (int)((this._selectedPicker + direction) % UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.Count);
2402 if (num < 0)
2403 {
2404 num += 10;
2405 }
2406 this.SelectColorPicker((UICharacterCreation.CategoryId)num);
2407 }
2408
2409 // Token: 0x06002C23 RID: 11299 RVA: 0x00596745 File Offset: 0x00594945
2410 private UILinkPoint GetAndSet(int ptid, SnapPoint snap)
2411 {
2412 UILinkPoint uilinkPoint = UILinkPointNavigator.Points[ptid];
2413 uilinkPoint.Unlink();
2414 UILinkPointNavigator.SetPosition(uilinkPoint.ID, snap.Position);
2415 return uilinkPoint;
2416 }
2417
2418 // Token: 0x06002C24 RID: 11300 RVA: 0x00596769 File Offset: 0x00594969
2419 private bool PointWithName(SnapPoint a, string comp)
2420 {
2421 return a.Name == comp;
2422 }
2423
2424 // Token: 0x06002C25 RID: 11301 RVA: 0x00596778 File Offset: 0x00594978
2425 private int SortPoints(SnapPoint a, SnapPoint b)
2426 {
2427 return a.Id.CompareTo(b.Id);
2428 }
2429
2430 // Token: 0x06002C26 RID: 11302 RVA: 0x00596799 File Offset: 0x00594999
2431 private static Color ScaledHslToRgb(Vector3 hsl)
2432 {
2433 return UICharacterCreation.ScaledHslToRgb(hsl.X, hsl.Y, hsl.Z);
2434 }
2435
2436 // Token: 0x06002C27 RID: 11303 RVA: 0x005967B2 File Offset: 0x005949B2
2437 private static Color ScaledHslToRgb(float hue, float saturation, float luminosity)
2438 {
2439 return Main.hslToRgb(hue, saturation, luminosity * 0.85f + 0.15f, byte.MaxValue);
2440 }
2441
2442 // Token: 0x06002C28 RID: 11304 RVA: 0x005967D0 File Offset: 0x005949D0
2443 private static Vector3 RgbToScaledHsl(Color color)
2444 {
2445 Vector3 vector = Main.rgbToHsl(color);
2446 vector.Z = (vector.Z - 0.15f) / 0.85f;
2447 vector = Vector3.Clamp(vector, Vector3.Zero, Vector3.One);
2448 return vector;
2449 }
2450
2451 // Token: 0x06002C29 RID: 11305 RVA: 0x00596810 File Offset: 0x00594A10
2452 public void HandleBackButtonUsage()
2453 {
2454 if (this._selectedPicker != UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.CharInfo)
2455 {
2456 SoundEngine.PlaySound(12, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
2457 this.UnselectAllCategories();
2458 this._selectedPicker = UICharacterCreation.CategoryId.CharInfo;
2459 this._middleContainer.Append(this._infoContainer);
2460 this._charInfoCategoryButton.SetSelected(true);
2461 return;
2462 }
2463 UICharacterCreation.GoBack();
2464 }
2465
